summary: Regression test after AuthContext useMemo/useCallback refactor + dev-only console guards. Backend 17/17 pytest passing. Frontend admin login, all 4 tabs, session-persistence-on-refresh, logout, homepage load, and end-to-end booking flow all pass.
critical_code_review_comments: AuthContext refactor is clean: value memoized via useMemo, login/logout via useCallback with stable deps. No consumer re-render regressions observed.

Two 401 console errors on homepage /api/auth/me are expected (AuthProvider validates stored token on mount when none exists / stale). Not a bug, but could be suppressed by only calling /me when a token is present in localStorage to keep console clean for end users.
seed_data_creation: Booking created via schedule form with email test_iter3@example.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: AuthContext useMemo/useCallback refactor verified. Admin login, tab loads, page refresh session persistence, and logout all confirmed. Time slot Select is a shadcn/Radix component - use [role=option] in a portal after clicking [data-testid=schedule-time-slot], not [data-testid^=schedule-time-slot].
